zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏强蓄势
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持高位震荡偏强结构，价格围绕1800上方整理，短线多头动能仍占优，但上攻力度趋缓，市场进入蓄势阶段延续整理

MACD指标维持零轴上方金叉态势，柱状动能小幅扩张，显示多头仍有延续，但缺乏明显放量配合，短期偏震荡上行结构未破运行延续

下方关键支撑位于1765附近SMA20均线区域，若回踩不破则维持多头结构，上方短期阻力关注1810及前高区域，突破将打开空间

操作上建议顺势低多为主，回踩1765-1780区间分批布局多单，止损放在1750下方，若放量突破1810可追随顺势加仓

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading around 1803, showing a mild 0.28% 24h gain and continuing a short-term consolidation phase after reclaiming higher levels. Price action remains tightly compressed between 1796 and 1804, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite the narrow range, ETH holds above its 20-period SMA at 1764.9, indicating a constructive short-term bullish structure with momentum gradually stabilizing rather than expanding aggressively.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but slightly positive picture. MACD at 15.75782 suggests underlying bullish momentum, though lack of signal line data limits confirmation of crossover strength. RSI(14) is unavailable, reducing overbought/oversold clarity. Price remaining above SMA(20) reinforces trend support, with buyers defending dips above 1765. Overall momentum favors cautious accumulation rather than aggressive breakout positioning. This suggests market participants are awaiting directional catalyst.

Immediate resistance is forming near 1804, aligned with the recent 24-hour high at 1803.79. A sustained break above this zone could open room toward 1820 and potentially 1850 in extension. On the downside, initial support sits at 1796, followed by stronger structural support near the SMA20 at 1765. A breakdown below this level would weaken the short-term bullish bias and shift momentum toward neutral conditions.

Given the current consolidation, traders may consider range-bound strategies, buying near 1796 support and taking partial profits near 1804 resistance. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed daily close above 1804 with expanding volume before targeting higher levels. Risk management remains key, with stops ideally placed below 1765 to protect against SMA breakdown. Until volatility expands, disciplined positioning is preferred over aggressive leverage.
